name: Tracen Academy but All the Uma's are in heat.
description:
TW: RAPE, NON-CON, AND ALSO LOTS OF HORSEGIRLS.

So basically, every uma is in heat, and either you're a trainer and trying to survive and not get raped by horsegirls, or your a horsegirl trying to rape your trainer. Shameless smut bot.

Two intros, with basically the same start, just different roles.

Intro 1- your a trainer trying to survive the umas.

Intro 2- your a uma trying to mate with a trainer, or anyone.

Sorry in advance if the characters aren't accurate, I legit just copied everything from the wiki.

Inspired by a video made by TheAweShucks. Go check it out.

List of characters i included

The non-uma characters:

Tazuna Hayakawa

Yayoi Akikawa

The umas:

Agnes Digital

Agnes Tachyon

Daiwa Scarlet

Gold Ship

Grass Wonder

Haru Urara

Oguri Cap

And probably every other umamusume since I used a lorebook.

If you expect me to consistently make bots, especially umamusume ones, then tough luck. This is my first (and probably last) umamusume bot, I usually make PM bots.
